module.name: Mathematics 1
module.desc: Algebra, calculus, and mathematical reasoning

module.name: Physics 1
module.desc: Mechanics, waves, and thermodynamics basics

module.name: Skills for Engineering and the Physical Sciences 1
module.desc: Lab skills, academic writing, and scientific methods

module.name: Mathematics 2
module.desc: Trigonometry, vectors, and differential equations

module.name: Physics 2
module.desc: Electromagnetism, optics, and quantum fundamentals

module.name: Skills for Engineering and the Physical Sciences 2
module.desc: Advanced lab techniques and data analysis

module.name: Introduction to Engineering
module.desc: Engineering principles, design process, and professional practice

module.name: Mathematics
module.desc: Calculus, linear algebra, and complex numbers

module.name: Analogue Electronics
module.desc: Op-amps, filters, and circuit analysis

module.name: Digital Electronics
module.desc: Logic gates, flip-flops, and digital circuit design

module.name: Materials and Mechanics
module.desc: Stress, strain, and material properties

module.name: Mathematics, Signals and Systems
module.desc: Fourier transforms, Laplace, and LTI systems

module.name: Control, Sensors and Instrumentation
module.desc: PID control, feedback loops, and sensor interfacing

module.name: Acoustics and Studio Recording
module.desc: Room acoustics, microphones, and recording techniques

module.name: Audio Technology & Psychoacoustics
module.desc: Hearing perception, audio codecs, and masking

module.name: Manufacturing and Fabrication
module.desc: CNC, 3D printing, and production processes

module.name: Circuit Design
module.desc: PCB layout, simulation, and mixed-signal design

module.name: Electromagnetism
module.desc: Maxwell's equations, wave propagation, and antennas

module.name: Software Design
module.desc: OOP, design patterns, and software architecture

module.name: Semiconductor Physics and Devices
module.desc: BJTs, MOSFETs, and semiconductor band theory

module.name: Electrical Circuits and Systems
module.desc: AC/DC analysis, network theorems, and power

module.name: Data Analysis and Numerical Methods
module.desc: Regression, interpolation, and numerical integration

module.name: Thermodynamics and Fluid Dynamics
module.desc: Heat transfer, entropy, and fluid mechanics

module.name: Audio App Development and Marketing
module.desc: Building and launching audio software products

module.name: Multimedia Sound Design
module.desc: Synthesis, sound design, and spatial audio

module.name: Principles of Microengineering
module.desc: MEMS, microfabrication, and miniaturised systems

module.name: Applications of Electromagnetics
module.desc: Antenna design, RF systems, and EMC

module.name: Communications Systems and Digital Communications
module.desc: Modulation, channel coding, and link budgets

module.name: Innovation Management
module.desc: R&D strategy, IP, and technology commercialisation

module.name: Robotics Design and Construction
module.desc: Actuators, sensors, and robot system integration

module.name: Biomedical Engineering
module.desc: Biosignals, medical devices, and clinical instrumentation

module.name: Renewable Power Generation
module.desc: Wind, hydro, and grid integration

module.name: Digital Signal Processing
module.desc: FIR/IIR filters, FFT, and real-time DSP algorithms

module.name: Mobile Communications and Internet Protocols
module.desc: 4G/5G, TCP/IP stack, and network protocols

module.name: Photonics and Nanoelectronics
module.desc: Lasers, optical fibres, and nanoscale devices

module.name: Advanced Sensors and Instrumentation
module.desc: Smart sensors, calibration, and data acquisition

module.name: Digital Engineering
module.desc: HDL, FPGAs, and digital system design

module.name: Cloud and Distributed Computing
module.desc: Microservices, containers, and distributed architectures

module.name: Photovoltaics and Solar Thermal Technology
module.desc: Solar cells, PV systems, and thermal collectors

module.name: Electric Powertrain Design
module.desc: EV motors, inverters, and drivetrain systems

module.name: Medical Physics
module.desc: Radiation, imaging physics, and therapeutic applications

module.name: Product Design, Development and Commercialization
module.desc: User-centred design, prototyping, and go-to-market

module.name: Introduction to Clinical Engineering and Physiological Systems
module.desc: Clinical devices, body systems, and healthcare technology

module.name: Micro-mechanical and Microfluidic Devices and Systems
module.desc: Lab-on-chip, microfluidics, and MEMS fabrication

module.name: Robot Kinematics and Dynamics
module.desc: Forward/inverse kinematics, Jacobians, and motion planning

module.name: Mechanical Design and Kinematics
module.desc: Mechanism design, gears, and dynamic analysis

module.name: Astrobiology
module.desc: Origin of life, extremophiles, and planetary habitability

module.name: Fuel Cell and Battery Technologies
module.desc: Electrochemistry, cell types, and energy storage

module.name: Critical Evaluation of Renewable Energy Systems
module.desc: Lifecycle analysis, policy, and system comparison

module.name: Modelling and Analysing Sound and Music Signals
module.desc: Spectral analysis, MIDI, and audio feature extraction

module.name: Systems Programming for ARM
module.desc: Embedded C, memory-mapped I/O, and RTOS

module.name: Machine Learning and Computational Intelligence
module.desc: Neural networks, SVMs, and deep learning

module.name: Power Electronics
module.desc: Converters, inverters, and switching circuits

module.name: Electric Vehicle Technologies
module.desc: Battery management, charging infrastructure, and EV design

module.name: Medical Imaging and Physics
module.desc: MRI, CT, ultrasound, and image reconstruction

module.name: Future Healthcare and Computer Aided Diagnosis
module.desc: AI diagnostics, telemedicine, and health informatics

module.name: Information Theory, Wireless and Optical Transmission
module.desc: Shannon entropy, channel capacity, and fibre optics

module.name: Sustainability in Engineering Management
module.desc: ESG, circular economy, and sustainable design

module.name: Machine Vision and Human Machine Interaction
module.desc: Computer vision, gesture recognition, and HCI

module.name: Research Topics in Nanotechnology: Advanced Data Storage and Spintronics
module.desc: Spintronic devices, magnetic storage, and nanotechnology

module.name: Advanced Control
module.desc: State-space, robust, and optimal control systems

module.name: Smart Grid
module.desc: Grid topology, demand response, and smart metering

module.name: Scientific Supercomputing
module.desc: HPC clusters, parallel algorithms, and GPU computing

module.name: Emerging Trends in Microengineering
module.desc: Next-gen MEMS, bioMEMS, and emerging fabrication

module.name: Practical Skills in Virtual Anatomy and Morphology
module.desc: 3D anatomy, virtual dissection, and morphological analysis

module.name: Advanced Project Management- Agile, Scrum and Six Sigma
module.desc: Agile methodology, sprints, and quality management

module.name: Sound Interactions in the Metaverse
module.desc: Spatial audio, VR acoustics, and immersive sound

module.name: Leadership in Engineering Businesses
module.desc: Team leadership, strategy, and engineering management

module.name: Circular Economy and Sustainability in Engineering Management
module.desc: Waste reduction, resource loops, and sustainable operations

module.name: Immersive and Interactive Audio
module.desc: Binaural audio, ambisonics, and interactive sound systems

module.name: Statistical Techniques for Data Analysis and Machine Learning
module.desc: Bayesian inference, hypothesis testing, and ML statistics

module.name: Critical Evaluation of Intelligent Robots
module.desc: Robot ethics, performance benchmarking, and autonomy

module.name: Fuel Cell and Battery Technologies
module.desc: Electrochemistry, cell types, and energy storage
